title: ETF Replacement Momentum
objective: Build a serious-retail stock sleeve that can plausibly replace a passive broad-equity allocation instead of just screenshotting one hot niche run.
summary: This is the broad stock thesis closest to product shape. It already has a promoted reference, but the bench still needs to keep testing broader and stronger challengers.
last_meaningful_change: The frozen q076b momentum reference was promoted into the manifest-native path while broader ETF-replacement challengers remained in bench research.
promotion_target: Keep broad equity replacement as the user-facing stock story while the bench searches for challengers that beat the frozen reference honestly.

baseline.why: Current promoted stock reference and the baseline every broader ETF-replacement challenger must beat honestly.

campaign_pressure.summary: The promoted frozen reference is still the clear baseline; broader challengers are present but need fresh runs before the gap can be quantified honestly.

runner_up_gap.summary: The promoted frozen reference is still the clear baseline; broader challengers are present but need fresh runs before the gap can be quantified honestly.

family_groups.title: Regime-Aware Momentum
family_groups.summary: The current promoted stock reference family and the most mature broad-equity implementation we have.

family_groups.title: Strategy-Aligned Composite Screens
family_groups.summary: Broader top-N screening variants meant to widen the ETF-replacement thesis without abandoning the momentum core.

candidates.title: Frozen Reference

latest_run.summary: Current promoted stock reference and the baseline every broader ETF-replacement challenger must beat honestly.

notes: This is the current stock promotion reference, not the end of research.

candidates.title: C-Lite Monthly Top 12

latest_run.summary: Broader top-12 ETF-replacement challenger using the first composite monthly screen.

notes: This stays in the campaign because it pushes the ETF-replacement thesis broader than the frozen six-name reference.

candidates.title: C-Lite v2 Monthly Top 12

latest_run.summary: Second-generation ETF-replacement challenger using the winning C-lite ablation weights.

notes: Good example of why campaign != family: same thesis, different implementation weighting.

change_log.title: Frozen stock reference promoted
change_log.detail: The q076b frozen reference became the manifest-native promoted stock baseline while broader ETF-replacement challengers remained in research.

change_log.title: Broader ETF challengers tracked under one thesis
change_log.detail: The campaign now explicitly groups the promoted reference and the broader C-lite monthly challengers so the app can show research pressure against the live stock baseline.
